name: Linda's Nut Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in an electric skillet.
2. Add sugar, slivered almonds, and water to the melted butter.
3. Place a candy thermometer into the mixture.
4. Heat until the temperature reaches about 400 degrees.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, until it reaches the hard/crack stage on the thermometer.
6. Quickly pour the mixture onto a large jelly roll sheet (a large cookie sheet with sides).
7. Spread the mixture quickly.
8. Cool in the refrigerator.
9. Melt chocolate chips over a double boiler.
10. Spread the melted chocolate over the cooled candy.
11. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top of the chocolate while it is still soft.
12. Press nuts into the chocolate to secure them.
13. Allow to cool again.
14. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.
